name: Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA)
description: Federated Linear Discriminant Analysis for privacy-preserving dimensionality reduction and classification

functions.name: central
functions.description: Central part of a federated LDA algorithm.

arguments.name: label_col
arguments.description: Categorical class label column used for supervised LDA.

arguments.name: features
arguments.description: List of column names to include in LDA. If null, numeric columns are used.

arguments.name: n_components
arguments.description: Number of discriminant components to return. If null, max feasible components are returned.

arguments.name: reg
arguments.description: Diagonal regularization added to within-class scatter for numerical stability.
